name: Swiss Steak for the Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving-size pieces.
2. Coat the pieces with flour and seasonings (salt and pepper).
3. In a large skillet, brown the meat in oil until it is no longer pink.
4. Pour off the excess fat from the skillet.
5. Transfer the browned meat to the crockpot.
6. Add diced tomatoes, sliced onion, celery, and steak sauce to the crockpot.
7. Cover the pot and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours or until the steak is tender.
8. After cooking, stir the juices to thicken them into a gravy.
